title: Spiral Order Matrix II
hints: Think about how to traverse the matrix in spiral order: right, down, left, up.
Use four boundaries: top, bottom, left, right to track the current layer.
Fill the matrix layer by layer, starting from the outer layer and moving inward.
For each layer, fill the top row (left to right), right column (top to bottom), bottom row (right to left), and left column (bottom to top).
After completing a layer, move the boundaries inward and continue with the next layer.
